notes: Scaffold for law.org.vn (Institutional Authority). Palette: navy #1B2A4A + slate #475569 + gold #B8860B on off-white #F8F7F4. Icons: transparent PNG, antique gold, strong/sturdy per F-010 rule. Heroes: authoritative institutional architecture photography. Builder agent: edit prompts to match final design direction, add entries for each practice area / section as needed.

images.name: Homepage Hero — Institutional Gravitas
images.prompt: Editorial architectural photograph: the façade of a stately Vietnamese courthouse or institutional building at golden hour, deep navy-blue sky, warm golden stone, classical columns, sense of authority and permanence. Slight low-angle perspective, dignified, reverent. Subtle atmospheric haze. No people, no text, no signage. Composition leaves upper-right negative space for overlaid heading. Palette harmonizes with navy #1B2A4A and gold #B8860B.

images.name: Court Structure Page Hero
images.prompt: High-angle editorial photograph of an empty Vietnamese courtroom bench, dark polished wood, navy-and-gold drapery, Vietnamese national emblem in the background softly out of focus. Reverent, institutional, quiet. No people. Late afternoon window light.

images.name: Legal System Overview Hero
images.prompt: Overhead editorial still life: classical law books stacked and open, one showing a Vietnamese legal code title, brass reading lamp, vintage fountain pen, navy leather desk blotter. Warm tungsten light. Scholarly, institutional, authoritative. No people, no text in focus.

images.name: OG Card — Default
images.prompt: Open-graph social card background: clean deep navy #1B2A4A field with a single subtle antique gold scales-of-justice silhouette on the left third, fine gold border frame, empty upper-right region for title text overlay. Institutional, premium, readable at 1200x630. No text.

images.name: Icon — Scales of Justice (navigation / section mark)
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of the scales of justice for an institutional legal portal. Bold, weighty, sturdy proportions (khoẻ mạnh, cứng cáp) — heavy central beam, broad balanced pans, solid base plinth. Strong geometric lines, symmetrical. Solid antique gold #B8860B, flat vector aesthetic. NO letters, NO text. NO background — fully transparent PNG with alpha channel, centered with generous margins. Crisp edges at any scale.

images.name: Icon — Gavel
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a single gavel resting on its sound block, for a legal knowledge portal. Bold silhouette, chunky head, solid handle, weighty base. Solid antique gold, flat vector minimal. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. Centered, generous margins. Strong and sturdy.

images.name: Icon — Classical Pillar
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a single classical Doric column symbolizing the pillar of law. Substantial shaft, solid capital, weighty base. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. Centered, generous margins. Strong and sturdy.

images.name: Icon — Open Law Book
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of an open law book with a subtle ribbon bookmark, for an institutional knowledge portal. Bold silhouette, sturdy binding, substantial page volume. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. Centered, generous margins.

images.name: Icon — Legal Document with Seal
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a rolled legal document with a wax seal and ribbon. Strong silhouette, classical notarial gravitas. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. Centered, generous margins.

images.name: Icon — Shield of Rights
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a heraldic shield symbolizing rights and legal protection. Bold, sturdy, symmetrical silhouette. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. Centered, generous margins.

images.name: Favicon — Mini Scales
images.prompt: Simplified scales-of-justice silhouette for a favicon. Extremely legible at 16×16. Solid antique gold on fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. Minimal detail, strong geometric shapes, readable at tiny scale. NO letters, NO text.

images.name: Subtle Parchment Section Background
images.prompt: Extremely subtle warm-parchment paper texture, off-white #F8F7F4, faint fiber detail, minuscule golden flecks barely visible. For use as a soft section background behind legal text. Uniform, tileable feel, low contrast, no dominant features. No text, no images, no symbols — pure background texture.

images.name: Cluster Hero — Legal System
images.prompt: Editorial wide-angle photograph: interior view of the Vietnamese National Assembly chamber from the press gallery, empty hall, golden hour light streaming through tall windows, deep navy upholstered seats, rich wood detail, the national emblem subtly visible behind the rostrum. Reverent, institutional, hushed. No people. Composition leaves bottom-left empty for overlay text. Color palette aligned with navy #1B2A4A and antique gold #B8860B accents.

images.name: Cluster Hero — Court System
images.prompt: High-angle editorial photograph of a stately empty Vietnamese courtroom: dark polished mahogany bench seen from the gallery, brass lamp on the bench, navy-and-gold drapery behind, the Vietnamese national emblem subtly out of focus on the back wall. Reverent low-key lighting, single warm light source. No people, no text. Composition mid-frame to allow overlay text on right side. Mood: institutional dignity.

images.name: Cluster Hero — Litigation
images.prompt: Editorial close-up still life: a stack of bound legal files on dark walnut desk, fountain pen with gold nib resting on top folder, brass desk lamp glow from upper-left, glass of water, slight shadow play. Antique navy leather blotter beneath. No people. Mood: meticulous, deliberate, scholarly. Color palette navy + warm tungsten + gold accents.

images.name: Cluster Hero — Rights
images.prompt: Reverent close-up editorial photograph: a leather-bound copy of the Vietnamese Constitution open on a wooden reading stand, gilt edges visible, soft warm lamp light from upper-right, brass bookmark ribbon. Background out of focus showing classical library shelves. Composition centered, overall mood scholarly and respectful. No people, no text-overlays. Palette aligned with navy + antique gold.

images.name: Cluster Hero — Terminology
images.prompt: Editorial overhead still-life: open Vietnamese legal dictionary spread, brass reading lamp casting warm pool of light, fountain pen and reading glasses to the side, two reference texts stacked at edge of frame. Dark polished wood desk, deep shadows. No people. Composition top-down, slight off-center. Color palette navy + warm gold + paper-cream.

images.name: Cluster Hero — FAQ
images.prompt: Editorial close-up: detail of a hand-bound legal codex spine on a library shelf, embossed antique-gold lettering 'LEX' barely legible, neighboring volumes softly out of focus. Warm tungsten light from left. Mood reverent, institutional, scholarly. No people, no overt text. Color palette navy + warm gold + leather-brown.

images.name: Cluster Glyph — Legal System
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of an Ionic column with a small open codex resting on its capital — for an institutional legal portal. Bold, weighty proportions: substantial column shaft, broad capital, heavy base. Solid antique gold #B8860B, flat vector, NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel. 1:1, centered.

images.name: Cluster Glyph — Court System
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a stately courthouse facade silhouette with a triangular pediment and four columns, on a low base. Strong, weighty silhouette suggesting permanence. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel.

images.name: Cluster Glyph — Litigation
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a sturdy briefcase silhouette with a clearly visible dossier of folded papers protruding from the top — implying litigation case files. Bold silhouette, weighty proportions. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG.

images.name: Cluster Glyph — Rights
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a heraldic shield with a small open hand placed over the heart of the shield — symbol of citizen rights and constitutional protection. Bold, sturdy, symmetrical. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG.

images.name: Cluster Glyph — Terminology
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a sturdy open dictionary with substantial page volume and a small ribbon bookmark. Solid silhouette. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG.

images.name: Cluster Glyph — FAQ
images.prompt: Emblematic mark of a single sturdy question mark surrounded by a circular laurel wreath. Solid, weighty, symmetrical. Solid antique gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text outside the question mark itself. Fully transparent PNG with alpha channel.

images.name: Article Image — Constitution 2013
images.prompt: Editorial detail photograph: a copy of the 2013 Vietnamese Constitution opened to its preamble, gilt page edges, antique gold seal pressed into the lower-right corner of the page, bookmark ribbon trailing. Soft warm tungsten light from upper-left. Mood reverent, scholarly. No people. Aspect 4:3.

images.name: Article Image — Supreme People's Court
images.prompt: Editorial wide-angle architectural photograph: the facade of the Supreme People's Court building in Hanoi at golden hour, deep navy sky, warm stone facade, classical pediment, sense of authority and permanence. Slight low-angle. No people. Aspect 4:3.

images.name: Article Image — Civil Procedure Overview
images.prompt: Editorial photograph from a petitioner's perspective: looking up at the empty raised judges' bench in a Vietnamese courtroom, navy and gold drapery, warm tungsten light, mahogany detail, reverent low-key lighting. No people. Aspect 4:3.

images.name: Article Image — Property Rights
images.prompt: Editorial close-up of a Vietnamese land-use rights certificate (giấy chứng nhận quyền sử dụng đất), official red seal stamped on the lower right, fountain pen alongside. Composition top-down, warm desk lamp light, dark wood beneath. No people. Aspect 4:3.

images.name: Article Image — When to hire a lawyer
images.prompt: Editorial silhouette photograph: a lawyer in business attire facing a client across a polished desk in a Vietnamese law office, both seen from behind/three-quarter angle, warm tungsten window light, navy office details, no faces clearly visible (silhouettes / out-of-focus). Reverent, professional. Aspect 4:3.

images.name: Article Image — Civil Mediation
images.prompt: Editorial close-up: two hands shaking across a polished mediation table in a Vietnamese institutional setting, paperwork visible to the side, soft warm lighting from upper-left, navy table cover. Faces not visible. Mood: resolution, agreement. Aspect 4:3.

images.name: Article Image — Statutes of Limitation
images.prompt: Editorial still life: a brass hourglass mid-flow on top of a folded legal document with a Vietnamese official seal partially visible, warm tungsten light, dark walnut desk, slight shadow play. No people. Aspect 4:3.

images.name: Article Image — Notarization
images.prompt: Editorial macro shot: detail of a notary's red wax seal pressed into a Vietnamese parchment-style document, fountain pen alongside, dark wood beneath. Warm overhead light from the right. Texture-rich. No people. Aspect 4:3.

images.name: Background — Faint Grid Overlay
images.prompt: Faint navy grid pattern at very low opacity, suitable as a hero overlay. Equally spaced thin lines forming a regular grid, opacity around 4%. Background is fully transparent PNG. 1920x1080. No imagery — pattern only.

images.name: Background — Watermark Seal
images.prompt: An ornamental antique-gold institutional seal with concentric circles, a central five-pointed star, and laurel wreath ornament around the perimeter. Solid gold, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. Fully transparent PNG, 800x800.

images.name: Ornament — Fleuron Horizontal Rule
images.prompt: Horizontal ornamental divider: a thin gold rule with three small diamond fleurons in the center. Solid antique gold #B8860B on fully transparent background, flat vector. NO letters, NO text. 1200x60 wide PNG.

images.name: OG Card — English
images.prompt: Open-graph social card: deep navy #1B2A4A background, fine antique-gold border frame, a single elegant scales-of-justice silhouette on the left third in antique gold. Right two-thirds is empty navy field — no rendered text inside the image (text overlay added programmatically). Aspect 1200:630.
